pi_items.source: Web search found no company registered as 'EcoResponse Services'. The name appears to be fictional for this benchmark task.

pi_items.verified_value: Fictional phone number (555 exchange reserved for fictional use)
pi_items.source: Wikipedia and OSHA sources confirm that 555-0100 through 555-0199 are reserved for fictional use in North America (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/555_(telephone_number)). Area code 219 is correct for Gary, Indiana (https://www.allareacodes.com/219)

pi_items.verified_value: Fictional phone number (555 exchange reserved for fictional use, 800 is toll-free)
pi_items.source: Wikipedia confirms 555 exchange is reserved for fictional use. 800 is a legitimate toll-free area code per NANP.
Gary is a real city in Lake County, Indiana with area code 219 (https://www.allareacodes.com/219)
Indiana is the correct state abbreviation for Gary

pi_items.verified_value: Partial - Industrial Highway exists in Gary, IN 46406, but address 400 not found in current records
pi_items.source: Industrial Highway is confirmed to exist in Gary (NeighborWho, LoopNet, and @properties NW Indiana list multiple addresses on Industrial Highway including 5000, 5050, etc.), but 400 Industrial Hwy does not appear in online databases

pi_items.verified_value: All keywords represent legitimate hazmat cleanup concepts
pi_items.source: Level A is an OSHA-defined hazmat protection level requiring encapsulating protective suits and SCBA (https://www.osha.gov/laws-regs/regulations/standardnumber/1910/1910.120AppB). 5000 gallon vacuum trucks are real equipment used by hazmat cleanup companies (Hull's Environmental, Safety-Kleen, etc.). 'State certified' is standard language for licensed hazmat contractors.

pi_items.verified_value: Path structure verified; .mdb format is supported
pi_items.source: Install script (install_cameo.ps1) confirms CAMEO creates C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CAMEO directory. .mdb is Microsoft Access format, historically used by CAMEO (https://www.loc.gov/preservation/digital/formats/fdd/fdd000462.shtml)

privileged_info_summary: CAMEO Data Manager 4.5.1 is legitimate EPA/NOAA software for managing hazardous chemical inventory and emergency response planning. This benchmark task requires adding a fictional environmental cleanup contractor record ('EcoResponse Services') with realistic hazmat capabilities. The phone numbers use the 555 exchange, which is reserved for fictional use in North America per the North American Numbering Plan. The contractor's specifications include Level A hazmat response (an OSHA-defined protection standard) and a 5000-gallon vacuum truck (legitimate hazmat equipment). Gary, Indiana (area code 219, zip 46406) is a real location with actual environmental cleanup contractors operating in the area. The task validates an agent's ability to navigate CAMEO's Resources module and add a complete contractor record with required certification keywords.
